FFlagAXSendSessionForEvents.mechanism: Sends session data for tracking events.
FFlagAXSendSessionForEvents.purpose: Provides better analytics for game events, improving overall game quality.

FFlagEmitterSharedCurvePool_Staged.mechanism: Uses a shared pool for curve data in particle emitters to optimize performance.
FFlagEmitterSharedCurvePool_Staged.purpose: Improves the efficiency of particle effects, making games run smoother.

DFFlagCLI178222_Staged.mechanism: Enables a new command line interface feature for developers.
DFFlagCLI178222_Staged.purpose: Provides developers with better tools for creating and managing their games.

FFlagSetUniverseWithPlaceAndDC2.mechanism: Allows setting a universe with specific place and data center configurations.
FFlagSetUniverseWithPlaceAndDC2.purpose: Enhances game hosting options, leading to better performance and player experience.

DFFlagCLI178222.mechanism: Activates a command line interface feature for game developers.
DFFlagCLI178222.purpose: Gives developers improved capabilities to manage their game environments.

FFlagFixGridContentSize.mechanism: Corrects the way grid content sizes are calculated in UI elements.
FFlagFixGridContentSize.purpose: Ensures that user interfaces look better and function correctly for players.

FFlagSlimNoRandomSeedFromPart.mechanism: Removes the random seed generation from parts to streamline performance.
FFlagSlimNoRandomSeedFromPart.purpose: Improves game performance by making parts behave more predictably.

FFlagBootcampCLI165710.mechanism: Enables a command-line interface for bootcamp features.
FFlagBootcampCLI165710.purpose: Makes it easier for new players to access and learn game features quickly.

FStringFlipTimeStampFastString.mechanism: Optimizes the way timestamps are processed in strings.
FStringFlipTimeStampFastString.purpose: Enhances the speed of displaying time-related information in games.
